🔥 IMPORTANT FOR DELEGATORS! 😊

Validators: Bazer(LSTB), Mainer(LSTB), 100% Cashback(LSTB), Delegate Node(LSTB), Main Node(LSTB), Donny Dack(LSTB)

- *50% Cashback*: in LSTB token
- *Add LSTB*: to your wallet
- *Daily reward*: for holding LSTB (1 LSTB = reward for 1 AXM in staking)
- *Broadcast*: https://t.me/AXIOME_validator_channel
- *Discussion*: https://t.me/AXIOMEBlockchain_russian

If you do not add LSTB you will not receive rewards! 🚨

Activate now! 👍

#AXIOMA #LSTB #Cashback #Farming

🔥 ВАЖНО ДЛЯ ДЕЛЕГАТОРОВ! 😊

Валидаторы: Bazer(LSTB),Mainer(LSTB),100% Cashback(LSTB),Delegate Node(LSTB),Main Node(LSTB), Donny Dack(LSTB)

- *Кэшбэк 50%*: В токене LSTB
- *Добавьте LSTB*: В своем кошельке
- *Ежедневный ревард*: За холд LSTB (1 LSTB = ревард за 1 AXM в стейке)
- *Трансляция*: https://t.me/AXIOME_validator_channel
- *Обсуждение*: https://t.me/AXIOMEBlockchain_russian

Не добавите LSTB - не получите реварды! 🚨

Активируйте сейчас! 👍

#AXIOMA #LSTB #Кэшбэк #Фарминг

🔥 WICHTIG FÜR DELEGATOREN! 😊

Validatoren: Bazer(LSTB), Mainer(LSTB), 100% Cashback(LSTB), Delegate Node(LSTB), Main Node(LSTB), Donny Dack(LSTB)

- *50% Cashback*: im LSTB Token
- *Fügen Sie LSTB hinzu*: in Ihrem Wallet
- *Tägliche Belohnung*: für das Halten von LSTB (1 LSTB = Belohnung für 1 AXM im Staking)
- *Übertragung*: https://t.me/AXIOME_validator_channel
- *Diskussion*: https://t.me/AXIOMEBlockchain_russian

Wenn Sie LSTB nicht hinzufügen, erhalten Sie keine Belohnungen! 🚨

Jetzt aktivieren! 👍

#AXIOMA #LSTB #Cashback #Farming

🔥 DELEGATÖRLER İÇİN ÖNEMLİ! 😊

Validatorler: Bazer(LSTB), Mainer(LSTB), 100% Cashback(LSTB), Delegate Node(LSTB), Main Node(LSTB), Donny Dack(LSTB)

- *%50 Cashback*: LSTB tokeninde
- *LSTB ekleyin*: cüzdanınıza
- *Günlük ödül*: LSTB tutmak için (1 LSTB = stakingdeki 1 AXM ödülü)
- *Yayın*: https://t.me/AXIOME_validator_channel
- *Tartışma*: https://t.me/AXIOMEBlockchain_russian

LSTB eklemezseniz ödül alamazsınız! 🚨

Şimdi etkinleştirin! 👍

#AXIOMA #LSTB #Cashback #Farming
